query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audio_play_counts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  track_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  artist VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  play_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  last_played_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_play_count (play_count DESC)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zpoeP3x1cmc7iMR.f2a79e44485f --database eSHiAmKDzW4pqcyH7Ttb7c --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audio_play_counts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  track_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  artist VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  play_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  last_played_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_play_count (play_count DESC)
);
